goal: has_derivative_at(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](constant(c), f), x0, c * d)

proof: function(x1: Real -> Real, x2: Real) { has_derivative_at(x1, x0, x2) = derivative_pred(x2, x1) }(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](constant[Real, Real](c), f), c * d)
function(x1: Real -> Real, x2: Real) { has_derivative_at(x1, x0, x2) = derivative_pred(x2, x1) }(const_mul_left(c, pow_real_fn(n.suc)), c * (from_nat[Real](n.suc) * x0.pow(n)))

goal: exists(k0: Real) { has_derivative_at(monomial_real_fn(c, n.suc), x0, k0) }
proof: function(x1: Real) { not has_derivative_at(monomial_real_fn(c, n.suc), x0, x1) }(c * (from_nat[Real](n.suc) * x0.pow(n)))
let w0: Real satisfy { has_derivative_at(monomial_real_fn(c, n.suc), x0, w0) }
function(x1: Real -> Real, x2: Real) { exists(k0: Real) { has_derivative_at(x1, x2, k0) } = differentiable_at(x1, x2) }(monomial_real_fn(c, n.suc), x0)

goal: has_derivative_at(pointwise_pow(f, n.suc), x0, from_nat[Real](n.suc) * f(x0).pow(n) * d)
has_derivative_at(const_mul_left(c, pointwise_pow(f, n.suc)), x0, c * (from_nat[Real](n.suc) * f(x0).pow(n) * d))
general_monomial_fn(c, f, n.suc) = const_mul_left(c, pointwise_pow(f, n.suc))
derivative_pred(c * (from_nat[Real](n.suc) * f(x0).pow(n) * d), const_mul_left(c, pointwise_pow(f, n.suc)))
proof: function(x1: Real -> Real, x2: Real) { has_derivative_at(x1, x0, x2) = derivative_pred(x2, x1) }(const_mul_left(c, pointwise_pow(f, n.suc)), c * (from_nat[Real](n.suc) * f(x0).pow(n) * d))

goal: derivative_pred(c * (from_nat[Real](n.suc) * f(x0).pow(n) * d), general_monomial_fn(c, f, n.suc))
has_derivative_at(general_monomial_fn(c, f, n.suc), x0, c * (from_nat[Real](n.suc) * f(x0).pow(n) * d))

proof: function(x1: Real -> Real, x2: Real) { exists(k0: Real) { has_derivative_at(x1, x2, k0) } = differentiable_at(x1, x2) }(f, x0)

goal: has_derivative_at(general_monomial_fn(c, f, n.suc), x0, c * (from_nat[Real](n.suc) * f(x0).pow(n) * d))
exists(k0: Real) { has_derivative_at(general_monomial_fn(c, f, n.suc), x0, k0) }
proof: function(x1: Real) { not has_derivative_at(general_monomial_fn(c, f, n.suc), x0, x1) }(c * (from_nat[Real](n.suc) * f(x0).pow(n) * d))
let w0: Real satisfy { has_derivative_at(general_monomial_fn(c, f, n.suc), x0, w0) }
function(x1: Real -> Real, x2: Real) { exists(k0: Real) { has_derivative_at(x1, x2, k0) } = differentiable_at(x1, x2) }(general_monomial_fn(c, f, n.suc), x0)
